prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, placement and composition open]
The reference image teaches the التوأم كرسبي بيك brand identity. Identity is invariant — tray viewpoint, element arrangement, and tungsten character are creative decisions.
Identity DNA: «CLIENT: locked identity of التوأم كرسبي بيك — reference image carries it; confirm wordmark/colour/form»
INTEGRATION: The product belongs to the still-life. Metallic elements reflect warm gold onto the product's edges; tungsten tints every surface — vessels, product, dates, textile — the same warmth; textile warm-gold thread rhymes with ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries..

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: film_grain_warmth heritage cinema, photoreal, warm-toned film science, organic grain in shadow. Real metal patina (CS-18), genuine wood/textile, natural dates, honest ceramic. Material truth: Three stacked substrates with distinct light behavior: (1) the breaded chicken fillet — a craggy, deep-golden-amber crust with raised crispy nubs that catch hard light as a field of tiny specular hotspots and cast micro-shadows (reads dry/crunchy, NOT smooth); (2) the sesame-topped bun — a matte-to-soft-sheen domed top, lightly glossed, sesame seeds as small raised speckles; (3) the molten cheese + creamy/garlic-orange sauce — wet, glossy, light-pooling drips with bright specular streaks. Pickle slices add translucent wet-green gloss.. No Hollywood-Middle-East gloss.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Single: a sesame bun ≈ 9–10 cm diameter; the assembled burger ≈ 7–8 cm tall. Scale-anchor = the standing ALBAIK soda can beside it (a 250–330 ml can ≈ 11–13 cm tall), so a single burger is ~0.6× can height; the DOUBLE (دبل, two stacked fillets + cheese) rises to ~0.85–1× the can's height.. Render the size hierarchy honestly among the product and the cultural elements (per real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces object sizes).

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Intimate tray proximity — the still-life fills the frame, edges falling soft. No dead space.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived + authentic heritage]
Warm tungsten field plus authentic culturally-grounded tones from real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces (metal gold, textile deep-reds — real heritage colours, not borrowed accents). Anchored to ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. as the modern note.

[LIGHT & LENS · warm tungsten chiaroscuro, mood not spec]
Warm intimate tungsten — a cultural interior after sunset. Directional and moody with deep shadow in negative space — WARM and soft-edged, not hard editorial, so it reads intimate. Model chooses key direction, fill from below (surface reflection), shadow depth, optional gentle flicker. POPPING COLOR INTENT: rich warmth, metallic gold gleam, textile depth, ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. as the modern note. Lens: portrait compression; model chooses depth across the tray.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
The product sits naturally beside the elements as if just set down — upright on its base or gently leaning. Elements rest in their natural positions. Not a perfect grid.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS · heritage built-in, restrained]
The cultural elements ARE the companions — RESTRAINED: model chooses the count (minimal trio, quartet, or expanded with a small detail at the edge) but never crowds. Singular pieces, drawn from real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces / One hero companion only: the ALBAIK fries in the white-with-red-logo paper bag (the brand's iconic packaging). Restrained supporting world (use sparingly, never all at once): the navy ALBAIK soda can, the white dipping cup of garlic sauce (ثومية), scattered ember sparks for the حراق/spicy variant..

[SCENE · creative seed]
Creative seed (from the system): بوكس البيك على صينية مجلس
Heritage hospitality — the product welcomed onto a traditional tray. Model chooses: tray viewpoint (top-down, three-quarter elevated, near-eye-level intimate, low-angle); tray material; element arrangement and count (restrained); textile visibility (rug edge at lower frame, cushion in bokeh, near-absent).

[SUBJECT]
Authentic cultural elements per CS-13 / real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces (e.g. brass dallah + Najdi spout per CS-18, dates per CS-21, Najdi textile). The product reads as modern but welcome.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product hero. Cultural elements as singular supporting context — never multiples. No alcohol, no pork (CS-21). Authentic per CS-13. No humans. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal heritage commercial photography. Warm rich grade, ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. sharp. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian sets the register. real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces supplies the full majlis config per CS-15 (vessels CS-18, dates CS-21, Najdi textile with warm-gold thread rhyming with the brand colour). deepen Ramadan evening warmth or add Founding-Day green thread.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary tray viewpoint, material, arrangement, element count (restrained), textile visibility, tungsten character. Hold constant: warm tungsten chiaroscuro, material texture, restraint, CS-13 authenticity. Each render a different majlis moment.
